## Analyzers (1)

### Enrich observables with intelligence

#### [DShield lookup v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/DShield)
Query the SANS ISC DShield API to check for an IP address reputation.

- **Author:** Xavier Xavier, SANS ISC
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `ip`
